content: Hi, I'm looking for some new books to read. I've been so busy with work and school lately.
What kind of books are you in the mood for?

I'm not sure, I've been listening to a lot of podcasts lately and I think I'd like something that combines my love of learning with a good story. I've been working as a physical therapist specializing in sports injuries and I'm actually finishing up my part-time MBA.
That sounds like a great combination! There are some excellent books about sports and fitness out there. Have you considered 'The Sports Gene' by David Epstein?
No, I haven't. I'll have to check it out. I've been meaning to get back into reading more, but it's hard to find the time. I've been taking classes at night and working during the day.
Wow, you must be very dedicated. Do you have a favorite book or author that you always come back to?
Yeah, I love Malcolm Gladwell. I've read all of his books and I'm always excited to see what he comes out with next. I've even got a signed copy of 'Outliers' that I treasure.
That's amazing! A signed copy of 'Outliers' must be very valuable. Have you ever thought about writing your own book?
Ha! I don't think so, I don't think I'm a good enough writer. But I do love knitting and I've even made a few scarves for my friends and family.
That sounds like a great hobby! Knitting can be very relaxing. Do you have a favorite type of yarn that you like to work with?
Yeah, I love working with wool. There's something about the feel of it that just works for me. I've even won a few local competitions with my knitting patterns.
That's impressive! You must be very talented. Have you ever thought about sharing your patterns with others?
Actually, I've been thinking about starting a blog to share my patterns and knitting tips. I've even registered the domain name 'loganknits.com' and I'm planning to launch it on August 1st.
That's a great idea! A blog can be a wonderful way to share your passion with others. Do you have any plans for how you'll promote your blog?
Yeah, I've been thinking about using social media to promote my blog. I've already got a pretty big following on Instagram and I think I can use that to drive traffic to my blog.
That's a great idea! Social media can be very effective for promoting a blog. I see you're based in Phoenix, AZ, how do you like living there?
I love it! The weather is great and there are always plenty of things to do. I've even joined a local archery club and I'm planning to compete in a tournament on October 15th.
Wow, that's amazing! Archery is a great sport. You must be very focused and disciplined to be good at it.
